ddls:
CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "year" TEXT /* Year of the team's season */,
  "league" TEXT /* The league in which the team plays */,
  "division" TEXT /* The division within the league */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* The name of the home stadium */,
  "location" TEXT /* The city and state where the team is based */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player (e.g., Pitcher, Catcher) */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* The date of birth of the player */,
  "height" REAL /* The height of the player in inches */,
  "weight" REAL /* The weight of the player in pounds */,
  "handedness" TEXT /* The throwing and batting handedness (e.g., R/R, L/L) */,
  "draft_year" INTEGER /* The year the player was drafted */,
  "draft_round" INTEGER /* The round in which the player was drafted */,
  "draft_pick" INTEGER /* The overall pick number in the draft */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_salaries" (
  "salary_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each salary record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "salary_amount" TEXT /* Salary amount of the player */,
  "bonus" TEXT /* Any additional bonuses received */,
  "contract_details" TEXT /* Details of the player's contract */,
  "incentives" TEXT /* Performance-based incentives */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* The date the salary became effective */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* The date the salary expires */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("salary_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_salaries_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_salaries_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, team manager, financial officer) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* The phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* The physical address of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* The department the user belongs to */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* The date of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* The status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data accessed (e.g., statistics, salary) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* The IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* The user agent string of the device used for access */,
  "duration" REAL /* The duration of the access session in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "positions" (
  "position_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each position */,
  "position_name" TEXT /* Name of the position (e.g., Pitcher, Catcher) */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the position */,
  "primary" INTEGER /* Indicates if the position is a primary position */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("position_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_positions" (
  "position_record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each position record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "position_id" INTEGER /* ID of the position */,
  "season" TEXT /* The season during which the player played the position */,
  "primary" INTEGER /* Indicates if the position is the primary position for the player during the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("position_record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_positions_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_positions_position_id FOREIGN KEY ("position_id") REFERENCES positions ("position_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_financials" (
  "financial_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial record */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "total_payroll" TEXT /* Total payroll of the team */,
  "budget" TEXT /* Budget allocated for the team */,
  "total_revenue" TEXT /* The total revenue of the team */,
  "profit" TEXT /* The profit of the team */,
  "salary_cap" TEXT /* The salary cap for the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("financial_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_financials_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "total_wins" INTEGER /* Total number of wins for the team */,
  "total_losses" INTEGER /* Total number of losses for the team */,
  "win_percentage" REAL /* Win percentage of the team */,
  "runs_scored" INTEGER /* Total runs scored by the team */,
  "runs_allowed" INTEGER /* Total runs allowed by the team */,
  "home_record" TEXT /* Home win-loss record */,
  "away_record" TEXT /* Away win-loss record */,
  "division_rank" INTEGER /* The team's rank within its division */,
  "league_rank" INTEGER /* The team's rank within its league */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_performance_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_evolutions" (
  "evolution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evolution record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "season_start" TEXT /* Start season of the evolution period */,
  "season_end" TEXT /* End season of the evolution period */,
  "stat_id_start" INTEGER /* ID of the statistics at the start of the period */,
  "stat_id_end" INTEGER /* ID of the statistics at the end of the period */,
  "evolution_type" TEXT /* The type of evolution (e.g., improvement, decline) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any notes or comments about the evolution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("evolution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_evolutions_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)
